PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Sep-30-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ryutaro Hirota, via ZOOM, for Kiyoka Tabesh, Executor.

The court begins by advising counsel that considering Ms. Tabesh's resignation as Executor, the Accounting Status Petition is taken off calendar. The court then advises counsel that the Petition to appoint Successor Executor will be taken under submission and reminds counsel that Ms. Tabesh must file a final accounting within sixty (60) days from today.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Letters Testamentary is submitted. A Status on Filing of Ms. Tabesh's Final Accounting is set for Dec-13-2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204. A Status on Close of Estate is set for Oct-05-2022 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Sep-29-2021 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-30-2021 Continued To Sep-29-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Aug-30-2021 Continued To Sep-29-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-07-2021 Continued To Aug-30-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ryutaro Hirota, via ZOOM, counsel for Kiyoka Tabesh, Executor.

At the outset, counsel apologizes to the court for the delays in this matter and reports that the delays have been mainly due to the pandemic and issues with the banks in Japan not accepting documents. The court then confirms with counsel that his plan is for his client to resign as Executor and appoint Jordan Goldstein as Successor Trustee. Counsel confirms and reports that Ms. Goldstein has provided consent to his plan.

After brief discussion, the Petition for Probate of Will, etc. and Accounting Status Petition are continued to August 30, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-07-2021 Continued To Aug-30-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar May-03-2021 Continued To Jun-07-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-15-2021 Continued To Apr-26-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ryutaro Hirota appeared by zoom for Kiyoka Tabesh.

Mr. Hirota requested a six-week continuance stating that he is very much in favor of the Court's idea to appoint a local Administrator, that they are reaching out to Jordan Goldstein to see if she will take over the estate and that they have not been able to reach the Executor in Japan to get permission to proceed with Ms. Goldstein. The Amended Report on Status of Administration is continued to April 26, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
